allow: Bash(node -e "const {DatabaseSync}=require\('node:sqlite'\);const db=new DatabaseSync\(':memory:'\);db.exec\('CREATE TABLE t\(a INTEGER\)'\);const i=db.prepare\('INSERT INTO t VALUES\(?\)'\).run\(5\);console.log\('run result:',i\);console.log\('all:',db.prepare\('SELECT * FROM t'\).all\(\)\);console.log\('✅ node:sqlite works on', process.version\)")
